title: burckella cocco
intro: Burckella cocco, also known as the Bakhaw tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Burckella cocco has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
